items.title: Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
items.original_summary: The US government has issued an export control directive to suspend all access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
items.chinese_summary: 跟进报道：Anthropic 再次声明响应美国政府出口管制指令，暂停 Claude Fable 5 与 Claude Mythos 5 的全部访问权限。该限制直接导致此前已发布的两款模型在所有区域不可用，与 InfoQ 报道的 Microsoft 部署受阻情况一致。对调用 anthropic.com API 的客户端，fable-5 与 mythos-5 模型 ID 应立即从可用列表中剔除。
items.backend_focus: 紧急行动：将所有调用 claude-fable-5 / claude-mythos-5 模型 ID 的请求回滚到 claude-opus-4.8（待发布）或其他可用模型。建议在模型路由层加白名单，临时禁用上述两个 ID，避免运行时 4xx/5xx 错误。

items.title: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude.
items.original_summary: Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across America. Announcements  Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glas...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 推出 Claude Tag，是面向团队与 Claude 协作的新方式，属于产品形态层面的新交互方式。具体 API 形态、SDK 接入方式、Tool Use 集成细节官方摘要未给出，与现有 Messages API、Tool Use、MCP 接入方式的关系尚不明确。已集成 Claude 的工程系统暂未收到接口变更或废弃通知。
items.backend_focus: 暂不行动。Claude Tag 的具体 API 端点、SDK 版本要求、与 response_format / Tool Use / MCP 的兼容性尚未公布。建议关注后续技术文档，待明确 SDK 版本号与定价后再决定是否集成。

items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  nefits of AI to communities across America. Announcements  Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approximately 150 new organizations in more than fifteen countries. Produ...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 启动 Claude Corps 国家级青年 fellowship 项目，面向早期职业人员推广 AI 在美国各社区的应用。与工程无关，是人才/政策类项目公告，没有发布任何新模型、API、SDK 字段，也没有定价、限流或区域可用性变化。
items.backend_focus: 无。属于人才 fellowship 项目，与后端工程无关，无需任何技术跟进。

items.title: Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approximately 150 new organizations in more than fifteen countries.
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across Am...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 将 Project Glasswing 扩展到约 150 个新组织、覆盖 15 个以上国家，属于企业 AI 安全/部署研究项目的规模扩张。Project Glasswing 是 Anthropic 的企业级 AI 部署与安全研究项目，本次仅为覆盖范围扩大，没有发布新的 API、SDK、模型版本，也没有改变定价、限流或区域可用性。
items.backend_focus: 无。属于企业研究项目规模公告，未涉及任何 API/SDK/模型版本、response_format、Tool Use、MCP 等接口变更，后端无需行动。

items.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 An upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger performance across coding, agentic tasks, and professional work, and the consi
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across Am...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 正式发布 Claude Opus 4.8，作为 Opus 系列升级版，在编码、agentic 任务与专业工作上表现更强，并继续支持扩展上下文窗口与 Tool Use。相较 Claude Opus 4.5，新模型在长程任务与 agentic 工作流上有进一步提升，模型 ID 由 claude-opus-4-5 升级为 claude-opus-4-8。已在生产中调用 claude-opus-4-5 的系统应准备迁移，但 Anthropic 通常会保留前代模型一段时间的可用性。
items.backend_focus: 升级路径：将 API 请求中的 model 字段由 claude-opus-4-5 改为 claude-opus-4-8，关注 max_tokens、context window、Tool Use 工具描述长度上限是否调整。Anthropic 通常会保留前代模型 3-6 个月，建议先在 staging 环境跑回归用例，再灰度切换。
